感情线：细水长流互相陪伴是最亲密的战友，彼此有好感双向奔赴，朦朦胧胧又带点小心翼翼的暧昧最好磕了！！！女主遇上事情顶不住的时候男主的出现真的好有安全感！！！希望后期女主成长得更快些早日强大起来能够护住小娇夫[求爆更]男女主的成长都真的好惨，心疼，希望是he！！！拜托！！！","text_exts":[{"e":137,"s":133,"text":"细水长流","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%BB%86%E6%B0%B4%E9%95%BF%E6%B5%81&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774130238671C6D7F%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227299477509048812325%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227265323311112915983%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%BB%86%E6%B0%B4%E9%95%BF%E6%B5%81%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":158,"s":154,"text":"双向奔赴","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%8F%8C%E5%90%91%E5%A5%94%E8%B5%B4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774130238671C6D7F%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227299477509048812325%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227265323311112915983%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%8F%8C%E5%90%91%E5%A5%94%E8%B5%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1699543136,"group_id":"7265323311112915983","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwgXM65E2E/l/aF6v628pJq7wm33E/RNg3F/IRMbaRlD","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/cd5dbb4e9cb4410a9029016932011ed8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709970&x-signature=9CSX0I7FbVXZ%2BfnM8FzCI5Vye3U%3D","user_id":"1072724859168301","user_name":"绝不摆烂！"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1072724859168301","user_relation":{"can_follow":true, 万物复苏，末世来临，曾经站在食物链顶端的人类，不得不重新寻找新的生存路径 。
本文没有丧尸！有异能！
